title: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING

figures_detected.description: Diagram showing board-on lift attachment points on the side sill of a vehicle without sill spoiler, indicating front direction and attachment positions at front and rear of the side sill.

content_blocks.text: LIFTING POINTS AND TOW TRUCK TOWING
Make sure vehicle is empty when lifting.

content_blocks.title: Board-on Lift — Models without sill spoiler

steps.text: The board-on lift attachment (LM4086-0200) set at front end of vehicle should be set on the front of the sill under the front door opening.
Position attachments at front and rear ends of board-on lift.

tools_referenced.name: Board-on lift attachment
tools_referenced.usage: Set at front end of vehicle on the front of the sill under the front door opening for board-on lifting.

model_notes: Procedure applies to models without sill spoiler only.
